phase_name: Phase 18 Remediation — Address Consistency Report Findings

items.before: An earlier study, applying RNAscope and IHC to human postmortem M1, reported that "VIP+ interneurons corresponded to 4.5, 5.2, and 6.6% …" (no inline citation)

items.note: Restored both narrative cite-key (replacing 'An earlier study') and trailing {cite:p} so the quoted statistic is attributable.

items.after: {cite:t}`Guetmccreight2020b` further organised hippocampal IS interneurons into I-S1, I-S2, and I-S3 subtypes
items.note: Replaced ambiguous 'The same paper' antecedent with explicit cite-key reference for laminar overlap percentages.

summary_per_fix.MF-18.1: Restored {cite:t}`Teymornejad2024a` (narrative) + trailing {cite:p}`Teymornejad2024a` on the orphan-quoted RNAscope/IHC sentence in §11.
summary_per_fix.SF-18.2 (An earlier study): Rotated 35 case-insensitive occurrences across §04 (15), §06 (9), §11 (10 after MF-18.1) using 8 alternates.
summary_per_fix.SF-18.3 (in the cited, §07): Rephrased all 7 occurrences of 'in the cited [row|preparations]' to 'curated row/entry' or natural-prose paraphrases.
summary_per_fix.SF-18.4 (citation key map, §11): Removed all 6 occurrences; rephrased as 'allowlisted reference set' / 'allowlisted bibliography' or 'this review's allowlisted bibliography'.
summary_per_fix.SF-18.5 (the same paper, §05): Replaced ambiguous 'The same paper organised hippocampal IS interneurons …' antecedent with explicit '{cite:t}`Guetmccreight2020b` further organised …'.
